actions.name: 客户编号_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 客户编号_ButtonEdit

fields.caption: 开户银行
fields.output: 客户收汇.对方开户行名

actions.expression:
SELECT customersbillto.Company,
       customersbillto.Bank,
       customersbillto.kh_id,
       customersbillto.Account,
       customersbillto.pid,
       k.company_name
FROM customersbillto 
LEFT 
JOIN (
SELECT company_name,kh_id 
FROM kh) as k 
  ON k.kh_id=customersbillto.kh_id 
WHERE (customersbillto.kh_id=[客户收汇.客户编号])

actions.name: 未命名事件
actions.caption: 未命名事件
actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,kh.dlmc 
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.company_name=:company_name) 
ORDER BY kh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 代理名称_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 代理名称_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT kh.dlmc 
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.ywdl<>"无") 
GROUP BY kh.dlmc

actions.name: 未命名事件560
actions.caption: 未命名事件560
actions.expression:
SELECT hbdm.hhl 
FROM hbdm 
WHERE (hbdm.hbdm=[客户收汇.货币代码]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件561
actions.caption: 未命名事件561
actions.expression:
SELECT yhhlsheet.sid,yhhlsheet.yhhl 
FROM yhhl,yhhlsheet 
WHERE (yhhl.sid=yhhlsheet.pid) 
  AND (yhhlsheet.hbdm=[客户收汇.货币代码]) 
  AND (yhhlsheet.hlrq=:hlrq) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY yhhlsheet.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件665
actions.caption: 未命名事件665
actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.sid,cymx.sjcy1,cymx.ywry,cymx.ywbm 
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=:fphm) 
ORDER BY cymx.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 业务人员
actions.caption: 业务人员

fields.caption: 业务人员
fields.output: 客户收汇.详细用途.业务人员

fields.caption: 外销部门
fields.output: 客户收汇.详细用途.业务部门

fields.caption: 客人名称
fields.output: 客户收汇.详细用途.客户名称

actions.expression:
SELECT wxht.sid,wxht.ywry,wxht.wxbm,wxht.customer 
FROM wxht 
WHERE (wxht.order_id=:order_id) 
ORDER BY wxht.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件563
actions.caption: 未命名事件563

fields.caption: 银行汇率
fields.output: 客户收汇.详细用途.银行汇率

actions.expression:
SELECT yhhlsheet.sid,yhhlsheet.yhhl 
FROM yhhl,yhhlsheet 
WHERE (yhhl.sid=yhhlsheet.pid) 
  AND (yhhlsheet.hbdm=[客户收汇.货币代码]) 
  AND (yhhlsheet.hlrq=:hlrq) 
ORDER BY yhhlsheet.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 未命名事件564
actions.caption: 未命名事件564
actions.expression:
SELECT hbdm.hhl 
FROM hbdm 
WHERE (hbdm.hbdm=[客户收汇.货币代码]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 收汇情况1_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 收汇情况1_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT krshsheet.sid,
       krsh.djdh,
       krsh.djrq,
       krsh.djje,
       krshsheet.sydje,
       krshsheet.syrq,
       krshsheet.ywry
FROM krsh,krshsheet 
WHERE (krsh.sid=krshsheet.pid) 
  AND (krshsheet.fphm=[客户收汇.详细用途.发票号码]) 
ORDER BY krshsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 费用审请
actions.caption: 费用审请
actions.expression:
SELECT fysq.sid 
FROM fysq 
WHERE (fysq.wxfp=:wxfp) 
  AND (fysq.hklx="检测费") 
ORDER BY fysq.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-已用外汇
actions.caption: 计算-已用外汇
actions.expression: [客户收汇.详细用途.使用外汇]

actions.name: 计算-银行收汇$
actions.caption: 计算-银行收汇$
actions.expression: [客户收汇.收汇净额]+[客户收汇.银行费用$]

actions.name: 计算-剩余外汇
actions.caption: 计算-剩余外汇
actions.expression: [客户收汇.收汇净额]-[客户收汇.已用外汇]

actions.name: 计算-收汇金额
actions.caption: 计算-收汇金额
actions.expression: [客户收汇.收汇净额]*[客户收汇.银行汇率]

actions.name: 计算-已用金额
actions.caption: 计算-已用金额
actions.expression: [客户收汇.详细用途.使用金额￥]

actions.name: 计算-剩余金额
actions.caption: 计算-剩余金额
actions.expression: [客户收汇.剩余外汇]*[客户收汇.银行汇率]

actions.name: 计算-银行合计$
actions.caption: 计算-银行合计$
actions.expression: [客户收汇.详细用途.银行费用$]

actions.name: 计算-使用金额￥
actions.caption: 计算-使用金额￥
actions.expression: [客户收汇.详细用途.使用外汇]*[客户收汇.详细用途.银行汇率]
actions.output: 客户收汇.详细用途.使用金额￥

actions.name: 计算-银行合计
actions.caption: 计算-银行合计
actions.expression: [客户收汇.详细用途.银行费用$]*[客户收汇.详细用途.银行汇率]
actions.output: 客户收汇.详细用途.银行合计

SELECT krsh.oppAccName
FROM krsh
WHERE   (krsh.khmc=[客户收汇.客户名称])  group by  krsh.oppAccName

FROM krsh
WHERE   (krsh.oppAccName=[客户收汇.对方户名])

FROM krsh

   AND  (krsh.oppAccBank=[客户收汇.对方开户行名]) group by  krsh.oppAccNo
